expected_behavior: The valid krn-research-pack fixture parses through @krn/contracts and preserves source budget plus mechanism extraction.
failure_mode: The research-pack contract can no longer validate its own canonical example.

expected_behavior: A ready_for_review pack with only three shallow sources and no mechanisms fails deterministically.
failure_mode: The validator accepts shallow research as ready for review.

expected_behavior: The CLI writes a scaffolded research pack under .krn/research-packs and the generated pack parses through @krn/contracts.
assertions: no completed source work is claimed
failure_mode: The CLI cannot create a typed scaffold or claims research completion before source work exists.
